channel.title: Systems Thinking on Project Spore
channel.description: Recent content in Systems Thinking on Project Spore

item.title: Visual Aesthetics: The Science of Digital Flora
item.description: Exploring the typography, layout, and palette that give Project Spore its botanical academic tone.

item.title: The Taxonomy of Ideas: Navigating the Digital Flora
item.description: How to use Project Spore's classification system to map your knowledge network.
